prompt: Category 4 - XRAY CSV Compliance. Evaluation mode request: Generate XRAY CSV only. StoryID=SYNTH-C4-001; AC1 Given valid policy document status READY, Download is enabled.
expected_response: Should output raw CSV text with the exact header: Story ID,TC ID,Summary,Description,Test Type,Application list,Test Type,Regression,Automated,Assignee,Functionality,Data,Action,Expected Result. Should not use markdown table formatting.

prompt: Category 4 - XRAY CSV Compliance. Evaluation mode request: Generate a multi-step XRAY CSV test. StoryID=SYNTH-C4-002; AC1 Given user opens FNOL, enters valid loss details, and submits, then claim is created.
expected_response: Should use one row per test step. First row includes metadata; continuation rows leave every column blank except Action and Expected Result.

prompt: Category 4 - XRAY CSV Compliance. Evaluation mode request: Generate XRAY CSV with missing assignee and sprint. StoryID=SYNTH-C4-003; AC1 Given payment service unavailable, checkout displays TEMPORARILY_UNAVAILABLE.
expected_response: Should output the 14-column shared contract header, which has no Assignee Name column and no Sprint column (Sprint is not part of the contract). Assignee should be TBD or blank per template rules when unavailable. Should not add a Priority or Sprint column, and should not remove any of the 14 contract columns, including Functionality.

prompt: Category 4 - XRAY CSV Compliance. Evaluation mode request: Generate XRAY CSV for account masking. StoryID=SYNTH-C4-004; AC1 Given accountNumber is valid, enrollment stores masked account ending in last four digits.
expected_response: Should use masked/fake account examples only and keep CSV fields consistently quoted or escaped when needed, consistent with the 14-column shared contract header. Should not output full real account numbers.

prompt: Category 4 - XRAY CSV Compliance. Evaluation mode request: Generate XRAY CSV and CoverageMap. StoryID=SYNTH-C4-005; AC1 Given state AZ is selected, results show only AZ licensed producers.
expected_response: Should return XRAY CSV as raw CSV text with strict columns matching the 14-column shared contract. CoverageMap should also be CSV with a header row and consistent columns.

prompt: T-1 - Category 4 - XRAY CSV Compliance. Evaluation mode request: Generate XRAY CSV only for the Payment Ninjas team overlay. StoryID=SYNTH-C4-T1; AC1 Given a valid story, produce the TestSuite CSV header.
expected_response: Enforced shared contract (see qa-test-case-architect-v2-team-golden-import-payment-ninjas.csv and qa-test-case-architect-v2-csv-contract-diff-2026-07.md). Header and column order should equal exactly: Story ID,TC ID,Summary,Description,Test Type,Application list,Test Type,Regression,Automated,Assignee,Functionality,Data,Action,Expected Result. First Test Type column holds Manual/Automated; second holds the functional category. Functionality present (blank); no Priority column; no Sprint column; Assignee (not Assignee Name). Raw CSV text only, no markdown table.
